calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Jiuan S. Fang.
Dept. 514. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Tristan Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Jiuan S. Fang.
Plaintiff's complaint for Collections/Open Book Account was filed on August 27, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Jiuan S. Fang occurred on December 18, 2018, and was effected on December 29, 2018.
Default as to defendant Jiuan S. Fang was entered on February 21, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 20, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Jiuan S. Fang, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,984.49.
Attorney Fees - $925.00.
Costs - $549.50.

Total - $31,458.99.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Continued To May-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Continued To Jun-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
